title: TpmRc missing Display impl — pub type formats as TpmRc(155) not a symbolic name
description: TpmRc is a public type (pub struct TpmRc(pub u32)) that users can hold and print. It has no Display impl, so format\!("{:?}", rc) gives 'TpmRc(155)' and format\!("{}", rc) fails to compile. Error::Display delegates to tpm_rc_name() but callers who hold a TpmRc directly cannot use the symbolic name. Add impl fmt::Display for TpmRc delegating to tpm_rc_name().
